Cortex XSIAM 3.0: Autonomous SOC Now Available

By Jane Smith | March 20, 2026

Today we are announcing the general availability of Cortex XSIAM 3.0, our Extended Security Intelligence and Automation Management platform, with major new capabilities for autonomous threat detection and response.

XSIAM 3.0 introduces machine-learning-driven alert triage that reduces analyst workload by 80%, integrated playbook automation with natural-language authoring, and a new AI-powered investigation assistant.

Key improvements include enhanced data normalization across 700+ integrations, improved MITRE ATT&CK mapping, and a redesigned analyst workspace optimized for speed.
